name: Gcore CDN and Edge Cloud API
what_it_does: Global CDN and edge cloud platform with REST API — enabling content delivery, video streaming, edge computing, DDoS protection, and cloud hosting across 160+ PoPs worldwide, with particular strength in gaming, media, and streaming use cases, plus bare metal and virtual machine cloud services in emerging markets.
use_cases: Distributing game content and game updates via Gcore CDN API for gaming delivery optimization
Delivering live and VOD video via Gcore streaming CDN API for media platform infrastructure
Purging CDN cache via Gcore API for deployment and content update pipelines
Configuring Gcore CDN resources with custom rules and security settings via REST API
Querying Gcore CDN traffic analytics and bandwidth usage via API for reporting
not_for: Simple static website hosting (overkill — use Netlify or Vercel)
Advanced WAF-only security (use Cloudflare for WAF-primary use cases)
Developers who need extensive SDK support (Gcore is API-first with limited SDKs)
best_when: A gaming company, media platform, or enterprise needs a CDN with extensive PoP coverage including Eastern Europe, CIS countries, and emerging markets — with edge compute and DDoS protection at competitive pricing.
avoid_when: You need US-West-coast-only delivery, advanced WAF features, or comprehensive SDK support.

auth.notes: Bearer token authentication. Token obtained via POST /iam/auth/jwt with credentials. Permanent API tokens available from Gcore dashboard. OAuth2 flows for platform integrations. Scoped access per product (CDN, Cloud, DDoS, etc.). No webhooks for CDN events. REST API documented via OpenAPI.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free CDN tier available; limited traffic
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go from $0.01/GB (region-dependent); volume discounts; Enterprise with dedicated PoPs
pricing.notes: Luxembourg-based company. Founded 2014 by Andre Reitenbach. Private company. 160+ PoPs across 6 continents. Particularly strong in CIS/Russia region (founded in Russia, headquarters moved to Luxembourg). Gaming CDN leader — serves ESL, Wargaming, and major game publishers. 10 Tbps+ global network. DDoS protection up to 1.5 Tbps. Bare metal cloud in 20+ locations. Edge computing functions. AI inference at edge (emerging). Cloud services in emerging markets where major clouds lack PoPs.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OpenAPI documentation. Token auth (JWT obtained via login). No webhooks. GDPR compliant. No credit card for free tier. Multiple product APIs (CDN, Cloud, DDoS, DNS) each with separate endpoints. Rate limits not documented. CIS region coverage strongest among CDN providers.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: CDN resource reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by time range. Resource creation not idempotent — check by name. Cache purge idempotent by URL.
known_agent_gotchas: Auth requires login to get JWT token — token has expiry (must refresh)
Multiple product APIs (CDN, Cloud, DDoS, Streaming) — different base URLs per product
No webhooks — must poll for CDN resource changes and purge status
Rate limits not documented — test before high-frequency operations
Company origins (Russia) — evaluate regulatory exposure for sensitive workloads

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. JWT token auth with expiry. Scoped access per product line. DDoS protection up to 1.5 Tbps. Custom SSL for CDN resources. Luxembourg headquarters (EU jurisdiction). Company originally Russian — consider regulatory exposure for sensitive workloads. No OAuth2 fine-grained scopes for CDN operations.
